testcase.name: test_execute_budget_or_success

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ReadTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='senior-france.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Read timed out. (read timeout=10)

testcase.failure:
tests/backend_test.py:190: in test_execute_budget_or_success assert r.status_code in (200, 402, 401), f"Unexpected status {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 in (200, 402, 401) E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
